blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I gulped down my saliva.
Shirone, who had switched the circuits in his mind to combat mode, had a completely different gaze than usual.
Shirone began timing his moves.
Photon Output boasted exceptional activation speed among offensive spells. But dark magic wasn't far behind in terms of speed either.
No signals could be read from Canis's eyes. Only an uncertain future swirled within them, like the black pupils of an orangutan.
These were not human eyes. Only someone who had survived countless times could possess such intensely animalistic eyes.
What kind of life must one live to have eyes like that?
The two twitched their fingers. Then, the moment a bird fluttered its wings and took off, they moved simultaneously.
Photon Output and the Power of Darkness clashed in a dazzling display, overwhelming the eyes.
Shirone teleported upward in an instant. The pursuing Power of Darkness, which had been chasing him vertically, melted away under the sunlight.
Canis smirked. His target wasn't Shirone's main body but the shadow embedded in the ground.
Realizing the properties of dark magic too late, Shirone hastily teleported beyond the cliff.
As the shadow disappeared a thousand meters below, the Power of Darkness, having lost its target, vanished like flames.
When Photon Output rained down like rapid fire, Canis cast Shadow Wall.
A thick barrier of shadow rose abruptly, absorbing all the photons.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Incredible strength. To block light with darkness...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The dark power defied the laws of nature.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone, who had amplified the power of Photon Output through thousands of rebounds, could guess just how formidable Canis's mental strength was.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then how about this?
Shirone concentrated photons in his palm, clenched his teeth, and hurled them.
As the Photon Cannon fired, Canis maximized the thickness of his barrier.
His lips curled up briefly, but the Shadow Wall exploded, and a flash of light surged in.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: What the hell is this?
Feeling a chill, Canis instinctively cast Dark Skin.
His body turned black just as the Photon Cannon struck his abdomen.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Guh...
The limit of shock absorption Dark Skin could handle had already been surpassed upon impact, and the shockwave rattled his insides.
Canis was sent flying, legs dangling, before being buried in the forest.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Canis!
Arin couldn't believe it.
Physical force imbued in light? Light was pure energy.
If even a small amount of physical force were embedded in it, any planet with a sun would have been shattered.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: This isn't just bad luck—it's like stepping in shit.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: A murderous glint flashed in Lucas's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: It might not be a profitable deal, but shouldn't the debt be paid?

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: His twin swords trembled as he fixed his gaze on Shirone.
Etella was somewhere in the mountain range, about 800 meters from the impassable bridge.
And before her stood Akein, who had risen to the rank of unofficial third-class archmage 40 years ago.
For Akein, this was an unwelcome guest.
Even if he had rested, the mental exhaustion from casting Abyss Nova had only recovered about 60%.
But such thoughts were short-lived.
Akein narrowed his eyes as he realized the true worth of the woman blocking his path.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Oh ho, what do we have here?
She wore oversized glasses that made her look clumsy.
Her ample chest and gentle, sheep-like appearance made her seem unlikely to engage in combat.
But he could feel it.
Just by standing there, every energy passing through her body flowed without obstruction.
Her pupils, especially, were remarkable.
They radiated the spirit of a sage, one who had transcended the eight emotions of joy, anger, sorrow, pleasure, love, hatred, desire, and greed.
She was a seeker.
And one far too exceptional to be a mere teacher at a magic school.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: She might just be able to counter Abyss Nova.
Etella was equally tense facing the authority of dark magic, a man who had made his name as an archmage even before she was born.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: I've heard of your esteemed name.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: From the monastery, perhaps?

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: A bishop, you say.
Akein burst into laughter, as if finding it absurd.
For someone not even thirty to hold the position of bishop was unthinkable in his prime.
Especially since Carciss was one of the continent's largest monasteries, with over 2,000 parishes.
A bishop was responsible for an entire parish, equivalent to the head of a city.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Where is Alpheas?
Etella remained silent.
She didn't know his whereabouts either, but even that fact could be information for the enemy.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: I can hear the gears turning in your head. Honestly, it doesn't matter.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: I never expected that cunning brat to fall for my magic so easily.
Calling Alpheas, who was past sixty, a 'cunning brat' gave a glimpse into just how long the archmage before her had lived.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Why are you looking for the headmaster? If it's a matter of grudges, the proper way is to resolve it face-to-face.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: If you release the students from mind control and withdraw, I can arrange a meeting.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Hahaha! Seems the brat has built quite a reputation in my absence.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: But child, Alpheas isn't the man you think he is.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: He's the most foolish and arrogant bastard in the world.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: His past doesn't matter. The headmaster now is respected by his students.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Oh? Is that so?

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: I'm curious. What exactly did that brat do to earn such respect? Care to enlighten me?
Etella saw through Akein's tactic.
The time when the sun would set was approaching.
He was trying to stall until night, when dark magic would be most effective.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: If you're waiting for darkness, you might as well stop now.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: As a teacher, I can't stand by and let evil deeds continue.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: What did you say?
Akein frowned in displeasure.
A mere child, 120 years his junior, dared to treat him as some magician who relied on stalling for time?
Casting the Power of Darkness, Akein's shadow began devouring the trees.
Branches rustled as trunks bent toward a single point.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Did you think I was afraid just because the sun was out? If so, you've gravely underestimated me.
Etella looked up.
Trees within hundreds of meters tilted, weaving a massive dome-like net.
As the sky closed, the surroundings grew darker than night.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Die, insolent wretch.
Akein vanished into his shadow—Dark Port, a signature dark magic technique.
By erasing the concept of distance through assimilation with darkness, he could instantly move anywhere a shadow existed.
The absence of any presence was Dark Port's greatest strength.
As Akein emerged behind Etella and cast the Power of Darkness, her body turned into a flash of light and retreated.
Dozens of shadowy hands clawed at empty air.
A high-speed battle ensued, starting with Akein's repeated use of Dark Port.
It seemed as though dozens of Akeins and Etellas were fighting at once.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Bishop of Carciss Monastery. Not bad at all.
Even Akein, filled with rage, couldn't help but admire her.
Though her mental magnitude fell short of his, her skill and senses far surpassed her age.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: Then I'll just have to exploit your weaknesses.
Etella's pupils shook with confusion.
As the Power of Darkness intensified, thousands of hands flew at her simultaneously.
An unfathomable amount of magical power.
Jonah's detection ability was worthy of being called a spell in itself, but even that couldn't evade thousands of hands.
When a branch's shadow grabbed her wrist, Etella abruptly stopped moving.
Attempting to teleport now would tear her arm off.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Ugh...
The shadow's tension was rubber-like.
But Etella's strength was no joke either.
Gritting her teeth, she yanked her arm, tearing the shadow apart.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: She knows martial arts too? Quite the sturdy one.

blocks.speaker: Akein
blocks.content: If that's your preference, I'll play along.
